svg.title: Comparison of three image delivery methods: base64, URL, and Files API file id
svg.desc: Three columns compare how an image reaches the model. Base64 puts the bytes inside the frame. URL puts a link in the frame and Claude fetches it. Files API uploads the image once and the frame carries a file id. All three deliver the same image; only delivery differs.
svg.text: Same image, three ways to deliver it
only where the bytes live changes — the model sees the same picture
base64 = bytes in the envelope · URL = address to fetch · file_id = ticket to bytes you already uploaded
All three arrive as the identical image in front of the model — only the delivery differs.
